de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.operator

Class TypeOperator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.operator.TypeOperator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExactInstanceof, Instanceof, New, NewArray, TypeCast

    public abstract class TypeOperator
extends Operator
implements TypeReferenceContainer
    Type operator.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TypeOperator

        public TypeOperator(ExtList children)
        Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.
        Parameters:
        children - the children of this AST element as KeY classes. May contain: a TypeReference (the referred type) 2 of Expression (the first Expression as left hand side, the second as right hand side), Comments

      • TypeOperator

        public TypeOperator(ExtList children,
            PositionInfo pi)
        Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.
        Parameters:
        children - the children of this AST element as KeY classes. May contain: a TypeReference (the referred type) 2 of Expression (the first Expression as left hand side, the second as right hand side), Comments
